points.title: Temple of the Tooth (Sri Dalada Maligawa)
points.description: The most sacred Buddhist temple in Sri Lanka, housing a tooth relic of Lord Buddha. Daily ceremonies at 5:30 AM, 9:30 AM, and 6:30 PM with traditional drumming and offerings.

points.title: Kandy Lake (Bogambara Lake)
points.description: Artificial lake built by King Sri Wickrama Rajasinghe in 1807. The 3.2km walking path offers stunning views and peaceful evening strolls.

points.title: Royal Botanical Gardens Peradeniya
points.description: Asia's finest botanical collection with 4,000+ species, famous Avenue of Royal Palms, Giant Javan Fig Tree, and Orchid House.

points.title: Bahirawakanda Vihara Buddha Statue
points.description: Majestic 88-foot white Buddha statue on a hilltop offering panoramic views of Kandy city and surrounding mountains.

points.title: Ceylon Tea Museum
points.description: Former tea factory turned museum showcasing Ceylon tea history with vintage machinery, tastings, and spectacular mountain views.

points.title: Kandy Market Hall
points.description: Bustling colonial-era covered market with fresh produce, aromatic spices, local handicrafts, and authentic cultural immersion.

points.title: Udawattakelle Royal Forest Reserve
points.description: Ancient royal forest sanctuary with 80+ bird species, walking trails, meditation caves, and panoramic city viewpoints.

points.title: Gadaladeniya Temple
points.description: 14th-century stone temple with Indo-Sinhalese architecture, ancient murals, and exquisite moonstone entrance carvings.

points.title: Lankatilaka Temple
points.description: Dramatic hilltop temple with towering walls, well-preserved Gampola period frescoes, and commanding countryside views.

points.title: Traditional Cultural Shows
points.description: Authentic Kandyan dance performances with elaborate costumes, acrobatic movements, fire walking, and traditional drumming.
